effect.subject: campaign_headline_colorway
effect.reserved_for: Gold/Sunshine or Brand Blue (tinted letters at 40% of the same hue)

rule_text: The campaign headline has two approved colorways only: brand Gold/Sunshine, or Brand Blue. In either case the tinted letters are at 40% of the same hue.
intent: Restrict the campaign headline to approved colorways.
summary: Campaign headline colors: brand Gold/Sunshine or Brand Blue, tinted letters at 40% hue only.
